title: cyclosorus pseudoparasiticus
intro: Cyclosorus pseudoparasiticus is a type of fern, specifically a species of the genus Cyclosorus, which is a group of vascular plants that belong to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus pseudoparasiticus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the affected area.
